$comment: Cycle D (C11/C23 6.4.5p5): adjacent-concat prefix mixing — the narrow trailing "cd" WIDENS to char16_t alongside u"ab". Read as unsigned short*, p[2]+p[3] = 0x0063 + 0x0064 = 199. `u"` gives a fixed 16-bit unit on all 4 targets, so ONE exit code witnesses the narrow-segment widen everywhere (a dropped piece over-reads the wide NUL; an un-widened narrow append mis-aligns p[2]/p[3]). The release optimizer arm returns the same.
